description_long: This object appears to represent a highly abstracted or stylized adult pedestrian figure, composed of elongated, interwoven, and angular forms. The structure is dominated by thin, stick-like elements that extend vertically and diagonally, suggesting limbs and a torso, with a base that is broad and flat. The lower portion is set on a smooth, undulating surface, possibly representing ground or a platform. The color palette includes muted browns, purples, and olive greens, with no discernible facial or anatomical details. The overall form is non-realistic and geometric, lacking clear articulation of hands, feet, or head. The figure's posture is ambiguous, but the vertical arrangement of elements suggests an upright stance.
description: A highly abstract, geometric adult pedestrian figure made of elongated, interwoven forms in muted colors, standing on a smooth base.
description_view_0: Vertical, stick-like elements are most visible, with a purple base and some olive green details at the core.
description_view_1: Diagonal brown elements dominate, with the purple base extending outward and some yellow-green visible beneath.
description_view_2: Mostly obscured by a large olive green surface, with little detail of the figure visible.
description_view_3: Brown and yellow-green elongated forms are prominent, with the purple base visible and some overlapping elements.
attribute_clothing_type: abstracted, non-descript garment with no clear style or features
